ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last updated the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants required for the experiment */,
  "num_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of sessions planned for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "experimental_history" TEXT /* History of previous experiments participated in */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who added the participant */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last updated the participant's information */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus is used in */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who created the stimulus */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last updated the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus presentation */,
  "stimulus_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the stimulus (e.g., for auditory stimuli) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who responded */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus that was presented */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond */,
  "correct_answer" INTEGER /* Whether the response was correct */,
  "response" TEXT /* The response given (e.g., left, right) */,
  "response_confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant's response (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Whether the response was accurate or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the outcome is for */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time across all participants */,
  "accuracy_rate" REAL /* Accuracy rate across all participants */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who created the outcome */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last updated the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., behavioral, cognitive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who scheduled the session */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last updated the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition is for */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who created the condition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who last updated the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., control, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* Researcher ID who uploaded the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., csv, pdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Administrator ID who added the researcher */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Administrator ID who last updated the researcher's information */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, research assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
